```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/apps/shared/assessment.css?v=8">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/apps/shared/abcjs-audio.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/apps/tune-assessment/app.css">
<style>
/* Collapsible panels (setup / notation / chord chart). Click a heading to fold. */
#app-root .ta-panel{margin:0 0 1rem}
#app-root .score-stack{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;margin:1rem 0}
#app-root .ta-panel>summary{cursor:pointer;list-style:none;font-weight:600;font-size:1rem;
  padding:.55rem .2rem;border-bottom:1px solid #e3e6ea;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;user-select:none}
#app-root .ta-panel>summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}
#app-root .ta-panel>summary::before{content:"▾";color:#6b7280;font-size:.8rem;transition:transform .15s}
#app-root .ta-panel:not([open])>summary{border-bottom:none}
#app-root .ta-panel:not([open])>summary::before{transform:rotate(-90deg)}
#app-root .ta-panel:not([open])>summary{color:#6b7280}
#app-root .ta-panel-body{padding-top:.8rem}
#app-root #tuneChart{max-width:100%}
#app-root #tunePicker .tl-results{max-height:300px}
#app-root #accompNotation svg{width:100%!important;height:auto!important}
</style>
<div id="app-root">
  <div id="flowStatus" class="flow nomic">Enable the mic to begin.</div>

  <details class="ta-panel card" id="panelTunes" open>
    <summary>Find a tune</summary>
    <div class="ta-panel-body"><div id="tunePicker"></div></div>
  </details>

  <details class="ta-panel card" id="panelSetup" open>
    <summary>Setup &amp; controls</summary>
    <div class="ta-panel-body">
    <div class="row">
      <div style="display:none"><label for="collection">Collection</label><select id="collection"></select></div>
      <div style="display:none"><label for="tune">Tune</label><select id="tune"></select></div>
      <button id="next" type="button">Next</button>
      <button id="play" type="button" style="align-self:end">▶ Play tune</button>
      <div><label for="tempo">Tempo (quarter BPM): <span id="tempoVal">100</span></label>
        <input type="range" id="tempo" min="40" max="160" value="100" style="width:170px"></div>
      <label class="cb" style="align-self:center"><input type="checkbox" id="chords" checked> 🎹 Chords</label>
      <label class="cb" style="align-self:center"><input type="checkbox" id="play-tune" checked> 🎵 Play melody</label>
      <button id="reloadAudio" type="button" style="align-self:center" title="Reload audio with current settings">↺ Audio</button>
      <label class="cb" style="align-self:center"><input type="checkbox" id="cycle"> 🔁 Cycle</label>
    </div>
    <div class="row" style="margin-top:.5rem; align-items:center">
      <div><label for="melVoice">Melody voice</label>
        <select id="melVoice">
          <option value="piano" selected>Piano</option><option value="epiano">Electric piano</option>
          <option value="nylon">Nylon guitar</option><option value="bass">Bass</option>
          <option value="vibraphone">Vibraphone</option><option value="marimba">Marimba</option>
        </select></div>
      <div><label for="accVoice">Accompaniment voice</label>
        <select id="accVoice">
          <option value="piano">Piano</option><option value="epiano" selected>Electric piano</option>
          <option value="nylon">Nylon guitar</option><option value="bass">Bass</option>
          <option value="vibraphone">Vibraphone</option><option value="marimba">Marimba</option>
        </select></div>
    </div>
    <div class="row" style="margin-top:.5rem; align-items:center">
      <div><label for="instSel">Instrument (display)</label>
        <select id="instSel">
          <option value="Piano" selected>Piano</option><option value="Flute">Flute</option>
          <option value="Clarinet">Clarinet</option><option value="Alto Sax">Alto Sax</option>
          <option value="Trumpet">Trumpet</option><option value="Trombone">Trombone</option>
          <option value="Tuba">Tuba</option><option value="Percussion">Percussion</option>
        </select></div>
      <div><label for="keySel">Concert Key</label>
        <select id="keySel">
          <option value="written" selected>As written</option>
          <option value="0">C</option><option value="1">D♭</option><option value="2">D</option>
          <option value="3">E♭</option><option value="4">E</option><option value="5">F</option>
          <option value="6">G♭</option><option value="7">G</option><option value="8">A♭</option>
          <option value="9">A</option><option value="10">B♭</option><option value="11">B</option>
        </select></div>
      <div id="transKeyWrap" style="display:none"><label for="transKey" id="transKeyLabel">Transposed Key</label>
        <select id="transKey">
          <option value="written" selected>As written</option>
          <option value="0">C</option><option value="1">D♭</option><option value="2">D</option>
          <option value="3">E♭</option><option value="4">E</option><option value="5">F</option>
          <option value="6">G♭</option><option value="7">G</option><option value="8">A♭</option>
          <option value="9">A</option><option value="10">B♭</option><option value="11">B</option>
        </select></div>
      <button id="enharmBtn" type="button" style="align-self:end">⇄ Enharmonic</button>
    </div>
    <div class="row" style="margin-top:.5rem; align-items:center">
      <div><label for="metroVol">Metronome volume: <span id="metroVolV">70</span></label>
        <input type="range" id="metroVol" min="0" max="100" value="70" style="width:150px"></div>
      <div><label for="chordVol">Chord volume: <span id="chordVolV">55</span></label>
        <input type="range" id="chordVol" min="0" max="100" value="55" style="width:150px"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="row" style="margin-top:.5rem; align-items:center">
      <div><label for="taAccomp">Accompaniment</label>
        <select id="taAccomp"><option value="off">Melody only</option></select></div>
      <div id="taNoteselWrap" style="display:none"><label for="taNotesel">Notation</label>
        <select id="taNotesel"></select></div>
      <div id="taTenorWrap" style="display:none"><label for="taTenorclef">Tenor</label>
        <select id="taTenorclef"><option value="treble8">Treble 8</option><option value="bass">Bass</option></select></div>
    </div>
    <div id="taMixerRow" style="display:none; margin-top:.5rem">
      <div class="row" style="align-items:center">
        <div><label for="ta-vol-melody">Melody: <span id="ta-vol-melody-v">90</span></label>
          <input type="range" id="ta-vol-melody" min="0" max="100" value="90" style="width:100px"></div>
        <div><label for="ta-vol-chords">Chords: <span id="ta-vol-chords-v">80</span></label>
          <input type="range" id="ta-vol-chords" min="0" max="100" value="80" style="width:100px"></div>
        <div><label for="ta-vol-bass">Bass: <span id="ta-vol-bass-v">90</span></label>
          <input type="range" id="ta-vol-bass" min="0" max="100" value="90" style="width:100px"></div>
        <div><label for="ta-vol-drums">Drums: <span id="ta-vol-drums-v">80</span></label>
          <input type="range" id="ta-vol-drums" min="0" max="100" value="80" style="width:100px"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:.35rem;display:flex;gap:1.2rem;flex-wrap:wrap">
        <label class="cb"><input type="checkbox" id="taShowDrums"> Show drums in notation</label>
        <label class="cb"><input type="checkbox" id="taCombined"> Combined score</label>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:.35rem;display:flex;gap:1.2rem;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center">
        <div><label for="taRepeats">Repeats</label>
          <select id="taRepeats">
            <option value="1" selected>1×</option>
            <option value="2">2×</option>
            <option value="3">3×</option>
            <option value="4">4×</option>
            <option value="6">6×</option>
            <option value="8">8×</option>
          </select></div>
        <div><label for="taIntro">Intro</label>
          <select id="taIntro">
            <option value="none" selected>None</option>
            <option value="count-in-1">Count-in (1 bar)</option>
            <option value="count-in-2">Count-in (2 bars)</option>
            <option value="last-2">Last 2 bars</option>
            <option value="last-4">Last 4 bars</option>
          </select></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    </div>
  </details>

  <div class="score-stack">
    <details class="ta-panel" id="panelNotation" open>
      <summary>Notation</summary>
      <div class="ta-panel-body">
        <div id="notation"></div>
        <div class="muted" id="cycleHint" style="display:none; margin-top:.4rem"></div>
        <div id="tune-audio" class="tune-audio"></div>
      </div>
    </details>
    <details class="ta-panel" id="panelAccomp" style="display:none">
      <summary>Accompaniment notation</summary>
      <div class="ta-panel-body">
        <div id="accompNotation"></div>
      </div>
    </details>
    <details class="ta-panel" id="panelChart" open>
      <summary>Chord chart</summary>
      <div class="ta-panel-body">
        <div class="row" style="margin:0 0 .6rem; align-items:center">
          <div><label for="chartBeats">Beat lines</label>
            <select id="chartBeats"><option value="0" selected>Off</option><option value="1">Every beat</option><option value="2">Every 2 beats</option></select></div>
          <label class="cb" style="align-self:center"><input type="checkbox" id="chartRoman"> Roman numerals</label>
        </div>
        <div id="tuneChart"></div>
      </div>
    </details>
  </div>

  <div class="cols">
  <div class="col">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="row" style="align-items:center">
        <button id="mic" class="primary">Enable mic</button>
        <button id="record" disabled>● Record performance</button>
        <span>Beat <span id="beatdot" style="display:inline-block;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;background:#e9ecef;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px #ced4da inset;vertical-align:middle;transition:background .12s;"></span></span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card">
      <label>Live</label>
      <div class="level"><div id="levelbar"></div></div>
      <div class="muted" id="liveNote" style="margin-top:.35rem">—</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col">
    <div class="card">
      <label>Result</label>
      <div id="capturing" class="muted" style="display:none">…</div>
      <div class="bar" id="progwrap" style="display:none"><div id="prog"></div></div>
      <div id="resultArea"><div class="muted">Enable the mic, pick a tune, then record a performance.</div></div>
      <div id="timelineWrap" style="display:none">
        <div id="timeline"><div class="tl-label" style="top:6px">Target</div><div class="tl-label" style="top:46px">You</div></div>
        <div class="muted" style="margin-top:.3rem">Rhythm: target vs your onsets (green = on time). Pitch is in the table.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card" id="recCard" style="display:none">
      <label>Recording — saved for manual review</label>
      <audio id="player" controls style="width:100%; margin-top:.25rem"></audio>
      <div class="row" style="margin-top:.6rem"><a id="download" class="btn">⬇ Download</a></div>
      <div class="muted" id="recMeta" style="margin-top:.5rem"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="card">
      <label>Tolerances</label>
      <div class="row">
        <div><label for="ptol">Pitch (± cents)</label><select id="ptol">
          <option value="35">35</option><option value="50" selected>50</option><option value="100">100</option></select></div>
        <div><label for="rtol">Rhythm (± ms)</label><select id="rtol">
          <option value="80">80</option><option value="120" selected>120</option><option value="180">180</option></select></div>
        <div><label for="sens">Onset sensitivity</label><select id="sens">
          <option value="0.04">High</option><option value="0.06" selected>Medium</option><option value="0.10">Low</option></select></div>
        <div><label>Octaves</label><label class="cb" style="padding:.55rem 0"><input type="checkbox" id="octtol" checked> ±1–2</label></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  </div>
<div id="taHiddenNotation" style="position:absolute;left:-9999px;top:0;width:1px;height:1px;overflow:hidden"></div>
<script src="/apps/shared/abcjs-basic.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/tunes/tunes-object.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/tune-assessment/abc-tune.js?v=2"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/session-log.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/pitch-spelling.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/tonality.js?v=4"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/abc-transpose.js?v=1"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/tune-chart.js?v=11"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/tune-library.js?v=6"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/satb.js?v=1"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/arranger.js?v=16"></script>
<script src="/apps/tune-assessment/app.js?v=33"></script>
</div>
<script src="/apps/shared/audio.js?v=3"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/establish-button.js"></script>
<script>
(function(){
  // Map from TOC anchor IDs to collapsible panel IDs.
  var ENTRIES=[
    {href:'sec-tunes',    panelId:'panelTunes'},
    {href:'sec-setup',    panelId:'panelSetup'},
    {href:'sec-notation', panelId:'panelNotation'},
    {href:'sec-chart',    panelId:'panelChart'},
  ];
  var MAP={}; ENTRIES.forEach(function(e){ MAP[e.href]=e.panelId; });

  // The QMD headings are stacked at the top of the page (they only exist so
  // Quarto generates the TOC entries). Hide them to avoid a block of bare
  // headings and so they don't confuse Scrollspy.
  document.querySelectorAll('h2.panel-jump').forEach(function(h){
    h.style.cssText='position:absolute;height:0;overflow:hidden;pointer-events:none;margin:0;padding:0;';
  });

  // Open a panel and scroll to it (works whether collapsed or expanded).
  function jumpTo(panelId){
    var p=document.getElementById(panelId); if(!p) return;
    p.open=true;
    // Wait one frame so the browser reflows the newly opened panel before scrolling.
    requestAnimationFrame(function(){ p.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'}); });
  }

  // Intercept TOC link clicks and hash-change navigation.
  document.addEventListener('click',function(e){
    var a=e.target.closest('a[href]'); if(!a) return;
    var id=MAP[(a.getAttribute('href')||'').replace(/^#/,'')];
    if(id){ e.preventDefault(); jumpTo(id); }
  });
  window.addEventListener('hashchange',function(){
    var id=MAP[location.hash.slice(1)]; if(id) jumpTo(id);
  });
  if(MAP[location.hash.slice(1)]) setTimeout(function(){ jumpTo(MAP[location.hash.slice(1)]); },150);

  // Replace Quarto/Bootstrap Scrollspy with a panel-aware scroll tracker.
  // Scrollspy targets heading elements, but all four headings are at the very
  // top of the page (before the embed), so it always lands on the last one.
  var toc=document.getElementById('TOC');
  if(!toc) return;

  // Disable Bootstrap Scrollspy on the body if Quarto enabled it.
  try{
    var spy=window.bootstrap&&window.bootstrap.ScrollSpy&&window.bootstrap.ScrollSpy.getInstance(document.body);
    if(spy) spy.dispose();
  }catch(e){}

  function setActive(href){
    toc.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(function(a){
      a.classList.toggle('active', a.getAttribute('href')==='#'+href);
    });
  }

  function updateActive(){
    // Find the panel whose top edge is highest on screen but still within the
    // upper 45% of the viewport — i.e., the last section header the user has
    // scrolled past.
    var limit=window.innerHeight*0.45, best=null, bestTop=-Infinity;
    ENTRIES.forEach(function(item){
      var el=document.getElementById(item.panelId); if(!el) return;
      var top=el.getBoundingClientRect().top;
      if(top<=limit&&top>bestTop){ bestTop=top; best=item; }
    });
    if(!best) best=ENTRIES[0]; // above all panels → highlight first entry
    setActive(best.href);
  }

  window.addEventListener('scroll', updateActive, {passive:true});
  // Re-check when any <details> opens or closes (panel height changes).
  document.addEventListener('toggle', updateActive, true);
  updateActive();
})();
</script>
```
